title: Gemini 3.5 Flash Looks Good For How Fast It Is
summary: Gemini 3.5 Flash Looks Good For How Fast It Is
whyItMatters: Google once again has a model worth at least some consideration. Gemini 3.5 Flash is likely the best model out there at its particular speed point, as long as you don’t mind that it is a Gemini model. So for cases where speed kills, this can be a reasonable choice. Otherwise, I don’t see signs you would want to use it over Opus 4.7 or GPT-5.5. Google also h…
